title: www.drybulkETF.com - March 30, 2021
summary: Spot rate rally stalls as attention turns away from the Suez Canal - With the six-day blockage of the Suez Canal Time for the Capesizes to shine - So far this year, the sub-cape segments have been the real surprise in dry bulk Volatility in freight should increase - In 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk shipping to total almost 3x

children.title: Overview
children.summary:
- Spot rate rally stalls as attention turns away from the Suez Canal - With the six-day blockage of the Suez Canal
- Time for the Capesizes to shine - So far this year, the sub-cape segments have been the real surprise in dry bulk
- Volatility in freight should increase - In 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk shipping to total almost 3x
